title: Uniformity of interpretation
doc_html:
Art. 745. Uniformity of interpretation

            Articles 741 through 744 shall be so interpreted and construed as to effect their general purpose to make uniform the law of the states which enact similar provisions.
doc_text:
Art. 745.  Uniformity of interpretation
Articles 741 through 744 shall be so interpreted and construed as to effect their
general purpose to make uniform the law of the states which enact similar provisions.
